# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: node-cache
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            .nuxt
            dist
            build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
            .prettiercache
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
            .cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/.eslintrc*', '**/.prettierrc*', '**/tsconfig.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: pip-cache
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .venv
            __pycache__
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt; fi

      - name: Cache environment-specific configs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.local
            .env.development
            .env.test
            config/development.json
            config/test.json
            secrets
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-env-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.ref_name }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-env-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-env-config-

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

  build-docker:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Cache Docker layers
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: /tmp/.buildx-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-docker-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Dockerfile') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-docker-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-docker-

      - name: Build Docker image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          push: false
          tags: myapp:latest
          cache-from: type=local,src=/tmp/.buildx-cache
          cache-to: type=local,dest=/tmp/.buildx-cache-new,mode=max

      - name: Move cache
        run: |
          rm -rf /tmp/.buildx-cache
          mv /tmp/.buildx-cache-new /tmp/.buildx-cache

  build-gradle:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '17'

      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
            build
            .gradle
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

      - name: Build with Gradle
        run: ./gradlew build --build-cache

  build-maven:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '17'

      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.m2/repository
            target
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-maven-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-maven-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-maven-

      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn -B package --file pom.xml

  build-rust:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Rust
        uses: actions-rs/toolchain@v1
        with:
          toolchain: stable
          override: true

      - name: Cache Cargo registry
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/registry
            ~/.cargo/git
            target
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-

      - name: Build
        run: cargo build --release

  build-go:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.21'

      - name: Cache Go modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/go/pkg/mod
            ~/.cache/go-build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-go-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-go-

      - name: Build
        run: go build -v ./...

      - name: Test
        run: go test -v ./...
